docs.title: CTO Urgent Memo: High-ROI Revenue Opportunity (March 2026)
docs.summary: While we wait for AWS Marketplace approval, we can generate revenue **today** by shifting from "Monthly Subscriptions" to **"Success-Based Memory Credits."** In March 2026, developers are moving away from subscriptions and toward **Outcome-Based Pricing**. We can sell pre-packaged "Memory Units" that guarantee an agent will never repeat a specific class of mistake. We sell a "Mistake-Free Starter Pack" for **$19/mo**.

Weekly active proof-backed workflow runs. This is the metric that matters most. Stars, visits, and installs matter only if they lead to teams running one monitored workflow with shared memory, guardrails, and evidence.

docs.title: PaperBanana Diagrams
docs.summary: - Monthly cap enforced by `scripts/budget-guard.js`. - Default cap: `$10/month` (`THUMBGATE_MONTHLY_BUDGET_USD=10`). - Diagram generation script blocks projected overspend before calls and logs spend only after successful generation.

docs.title: One-Line Pitch
docs.summary: Make one Claude workflow safe enough to sell and ship team-wide. ThumbGate is the AI reliability system behind one workflow with business value. It is not another horizontal agent platform. The front-line offer is a **Workflow Hardening Sprint** that gives teams shared memory, guardrails, and proof-ready runs so one workflow can be deployed, audited, and improved over time. - **Primary Goal:** Turn "vibe coding" into a controlled rollout for one sharp agent.

docs.title: Platform Research (As Of March 3, 2026)
docs.summary: This research was done on March 3, 2026 using official documentation or official product pages. 1. ChatGPT distribution should prioritize Custom GPT + GPT Actions (OpenAPI), not legacy plugin flow. 2. Claude and Codex both support MCP workflows; shipping an MCP server is the fastest integration path.

docs.title: Pricing Research (March 9, 2026)
docs.summary: > Historical research note: this document captures a point-in-time pricing exploration. It is not the current product truth. Use `docs/COMMERCIAL_TRUTH.md` for current pricing and proof language. On March 9, 2026, the working hypothesis was to keep Context Gateway at a `$10/mo` Stripe price for a limited period and position it explicitly as a founding price rather than the permanent list price. This monthly self-serve hypothesis has since been retired. The current public commercial truth is documented in `docs/COMMERCIAL_TRUTH.md`.

We had built a powerful local-first "ThumbGate Feedback Studio," but we also put massive friction between the developer and the commercial surface. docs.title: Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) Strategy for AI Agents
docs.summary: In the era of AI search and autonomous coding agents, visibility is no longer just about ranking #1 on Google. It's about being the **retrieved context** for the next generation of AI tools like Claude Code, Gemini CLI, and ChatGPT. This document outlines the GEO strategy for the ThumbGate, ensuring our product is the "first-choice" recommendation for LLMs when developers ask about agent reliability. We move from keyword-centric documentation to **semantic-centric chunks**. Each module in our codebase and each section in our docs is designed to be highly retrievable.
